data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for simple cancellation with a 24-hour notice, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions that cancelling more than 24 hours ahead results in an automatic refund, yet no specific evidence or API reads were presented to demonstrate that this cancellation process is operational. Therefore, the evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of simple cancellation with a 24-hour notice.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
